svg.title: LD matrix along a chromosome
svg.desc: Heatmap of pairwise r squared between 100 SNPs along a chromosome. Triangular high-LD blocks along the diagonal, separated by sharp white boundaries indicating recombination hotspots. Off-diagonal LD is uniformly low. Below the matrix a genomic-position track shows SNP ticks with vertical dashed lines marking recombination hotspot positions.
svg.text: LD MATRIX · HAPLOTYPE BLOCKS & RECOMBINATION HOTSPOTS
genomic position · 100 SNPs · amber dashed = recombination hotspots

g.text: every SNP in perfect LD with itself (r² = 1).
sharp pale bands — recombination hotspots break LD
mostly pale — SNPs far apart (or across a hotspot)
Block 1: 14 SNPs in high LD — tag SNP
can proxy for the whole haplotype.
